title: Device Settings - All toggles OFF - Persist after closing tab, settings page or app
scenario: Toggle button OFF state does not persist in Device Settings after closing/reopening tabs, returning to Device Home Screen, or restarting the Poly Studio Mobile app
steps: Tap on the connected [Device Name] to open Device Settings
Set all toggle buttons (e.g., ANC, Transparency Mode, Equalizer, etc.) to OFF
Return to the Device Home Screen
Force close and restart the Poly Studio Mobile app
Navigate to Home → [Device Name] → Device Settings
expected: All toggle buttons remain OFF after closing/reopening tabs, returning to the Home screen, and restarting the app.
